title: Handle horses safely for stock work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Handle horses safely for stock work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify horses and their typical behaviour

pcs.text: Distinguish and confirm horses by their colour, markings, brands and sex
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Distinguish and confirm horses by their colour, markings, brands and sex?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Distinguish and confirm horses by their colour, markings, brands and sex.

pcs.text: Identify horse behaviour related to the natural instincts, sensory perceptions and social behaviour of horses
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify horse behaviour related to the natural instincts, sensory perceptions and social behaviour of horses?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify horse behaviour related to the natural instincts, sensory perceptions and social behaviour of horses.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and interpret common horse body language?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and interpret common horse body language.

pcs.text: Identify how horse behaviour is affected by human behaviour
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify how horse behaviour is affected by human behaviour?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify how horse behaviour is affected by human behaviour.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental factors that may affect horse behaviour?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental factors that may affect horse behaviour.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate horse and observe horse body language and behaviour before approaching.
